title: Nike — Find Your Greatness (AI Concept)
creativeGoal: Push the boundaries of AI generation by creating a photorealistic, dynamic sportswear commercial that maintains brand identity and fast-paced motion.

caseStudy.problem: Traditional footwear commercials require massive budgets, locations, and elite athletes. I wanted to see if AI could produce a high-octane Nike spec ad that feels authentic to their 'Find Your Greatness' campaign style, using zero live-action footage.
caseStudy.concept: A fast-paced, gritty, and urban sequence showing athletes pushing their limits in futuristic, hyper-stylized environments. The narrative focuses on the inner voice pushing you to keep going.
caseStudy.promptEngineering: I used highly specific cinematic prompts in Midjourney: 'Low angle tracking shot, extreme motion blur, runner at night, neon reflections on wet pavement, photorealistic, 85mm lens, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting --ar 16:9 --v 6.0'.
caseStudy.imageGeneration: Generated over 200 base frames in Midjourney. The biggest challenge was maintaining consistency in the shoe design across different camera angles. I used Midjourney's style reference (--sref) and character reference (--cref) features extensively.
caseStudy.videoGeneration: Images were animated using Runway Gen-2 with custom camera motion vectors. I used the 'Motion Brush' feature to isolate movement to the athletes while keeping the backgrounds locked, creating a hyper-focused, surreal effect.
caseStudy.editing: Edited in Premiere Pro on a high-BPM grid. The pacing was aggressive, matching traditional Nike ads. I used dynamic speed ramps (time remapping) to transition between the generated shots, hiding some of the AI temporal inconsistencies.
caseStudy.motionGraphics: Custom glitch transitions, kinetic typography for the brand messaging, and futuristic HUD elements added in After Effects to sell the 'cyberpunk' aesthetic.
caseStudy.soundDesign: Sound is 50% of the experience. I layered heavy breathing, sneaker squeaks, urban city ambience, and a pulsing synthwave bassline. Voiceover was generated using ElevenLabs with a gritty, motivational tone.
caseStudy.lessonsLearned: AI video still struggles with fast, complex motion (like running legs). By leaning into a heavily stylized, glitchy aesthetic and using aggressive editing, these limitations became a stylistic choice rather than a flaw.

title: AURA — Luxury Fragrance Launch
creativeGoal: Create an ethereal, surreal, and highly polished brand campaign for a high-end fragrance, blending AI generation with elegant typography.

caseStudy.problem: The client wanted a 'dreamscape' environment (floating islands, liquid gold, blooming glass flowers) that was impossible to shoot practically within their budget.
caseStudy.concept: A visual poem moving from a dark, mysterious landscape into a golden, blooming paradise, symbolizing the fragrance's top and base notes.
caseStudy.promptEngineering: Prompts focused heavily on materials and lighting: 'Macro cinematography, liquid gold swirling, glass flower blooming in slow motion, subsurface scattering, octane render style, high fashion lighting, --ar 16:9'.
caseStudy.imageGeneration: Base assets were generated, then upscaled using Magnific AI to achieve razor-sharp 4K textures, crucial for luxury advertising.
caseStudy.videoGeneration: Kling AI was used for its superior fluid dynamics and slow-motion capabilities, allowing the 'liquid gold' elements to move naturally.
caseStudy.editing: Edited in DaVinci Resolve. The pacing was deliberately slow and hypnotic, contrasting the usual fast-paced social media style.
caseStudy.motionGraphics: Elegant, thin serif typography tracked seamlessly into the 3D space of the AI-generated environments using After Effects.
caseStudy.soundDesign: An ambient, ethereal track generated via Stable Audio, layered with crystal chimes and soft wind foley.
caseStudy.lessonsLearned: Upscaling AI images *before* animating them yields vastly superior results in video generators, especially for macro shots where texture detail is everything.

title: Neon Echoes
creativeGoal: Tell a cohesive, emotional story in a sci-fi setting entirely through AI-generated visuals.

caseStudy.problem: Maintaining character consistency across multiple shots and scenes in a narrative AI film.
caseStudy.concept: A detective in a rainy cyberpunk city searching for a lost memory core.
caseStudy.promptEngineering: Used character reference sheets. Prompts included specific camera directions: 'Over the shoulder shot, extreme close up on eyes, wide establishing shot of neon city'.
caseStudy.imageGeneration: Midjourney was used to create a storyboard first, establishing the visual language before any video was generated.
caseStudy.videoGeneration: Luma Dream Machine was used for its ability to handle complex camera movements (dollying, panning) while maintaining the integrity of the scene.
caseStudy.editing: Traditional narrative editing. Focused on eyelines and screen direction to make the disparate AI clips feel like a continuous scene.
caseStudy.motionGraphics: Subtle UI overlays for the 'memory core' perspective.
caseStudy.soundDesign: Heavy use of foley to ground the surreal visuals in reality. Rain, footsteps, neon buzz.
caseStudy.lessonsLearned: Storyboards are essential for AI filmmaking. You must know exactly what shot you need before prompting, rather than generating random cool visuals and trying to string them together.

title: The Future of Space Travel
creativeGoal: Create an engaging, highly visual 12-minute documentary using AI to visualize complex scientific concepts.

caseStudy.problem: Explaining theoretical physics and futuristic space travel concepts requires expensive 3D animation. I needed a faster, cheaper workflow.
caseStudy.concept: A deep dive into interstellar travel, using cinematic AI visualizations to replace traditional stock footage and charts.
caseStudy.promptEngineering: Prompts focused on technical accuracy mixed with cinematic lighting: 'Dyson sphere orbiting a red dwarf star, cinematic lighting, hyper-detailed, 8k resolution'.
caseStudy.imageGeneration: Used Midjourney to generate high-resolution 'concept art' style stills for the scientific explanations.
caseStudy.videoGeneration: Subtle animations applied via Runway to bring the space concepts to life (stars moving, nebulas shifting).
caseStudy.editing: Edited in Premiere Pro, using Descript for rapid rough cuts of the voiceover.
caseStudy.motionGraphics: Complex After Effects compositions to overlay scientific data, UI elements, and text callouts onto the AI visuals.
caseStudy.soundDesign: Epic orchestral score layered with deep space ambient drones.
caseStudy.lessonsLearned: For long-form educational content, AI is a powerful tool to replace generic stock footage, providing bespoke, highly relevant visuals.

title: Neon Grid - Cyber Fashion
creativeGoal: Create a hyper-viral, visually arresting short-form video that transforms ordinary street footage into a cyberpunk fashion editorial.

caseStudy.problem: The brand had basic smartphone footage of their clothes. They wanted it to look like it was shot in a neon-drenched futuristic Tokyo.
caseStudy.concept: A fast-paced, beat-synced fashion montage where the environment constantly glitches and morphs into a cyberpunk reality.
caseStudy.promptEngineering: Video-to-Video prompts: 'Cyberpunk city street, neon lights, holographic billboards, anime aesthetic style, highly detailed'.
caseStudy.videoGeneration: Used Runway Gen-1 to style-transfer the original iPhone footage, keeping the models' movements intact while completely hallucinating the background.
caseStudy.editing: Extremely fast, aggressive cuts. Every beat drop triggers a style change or a glitch transition.
caseStudy.motionGraphics: Overlaid CRT monitor textures, datamoshing effects, and digital noise.
caseStudy.soundDesign: Phonk music track, heavy bass drops, and digital glitch sound effects synced perfectly to the cuts.
caseStudy.lessonsLearned: In short-form, attention is everything. Using AI video-to-video for extreme style transfer is incredibly effective for stopping the scroll.

title: Invisible City
creativeGoal: Seamlessly remove modern elements (cars, streetlights) from a wide city shot to create an apocalyptic, abandoned aesthetic.

caseStudy.problem: The production couldn't afford to shut down city streets. We had to digitally remove hundreds of moving vehicles and pedestrians from complex tracking shots.
caseStudy.imageGeneration: Exported clean plates and used Photoshop's AI Generative Fill to reconstruct buildings and roads hidden behind cars.
caseStudy.motionGraphics: Complex planar tracking in Mocha, projecting the AI-generated clean plates back onto the moving geometry of the scene in After Effects.
caseStudy.lessonsLearned: AI image generation is revolutionizing VFX cleanup work. What used to take days of manual cloning can now be generated as a perfect clean plate in seconds.

title: Cinematic Moods
creativeGoal: Demonstrate the power of color grading to completely change the emotional tone and time of day of a single scene.

caseStudy.problem: Showing, rather than telling, how drastically color impacts narrative.
caseStudy.concept: Taking flat, rec709 footage and creating three distinct looks: A warm, nostalgic golden hour, a cold, clinical sci-fi thriller look, and a high-contrast gritty action grade.
caseStudy.lessonsLearned: Color is the final rewrite of the script. Mastering DaVinci's node-based workflow and advanced color management (ACES) is crucial for a premium cinematic finish.

title: Ethereal Beats
creativeGoal: Create a fully audio-reactive, continuous AI journey through surreal landscapes.

caseStudy.problem: Syncing continuous, hallucinating AI generation perfectly with complex audio stems.
caseStudy.concept: A visual journey that morphs through different dimensions based on the frequency and amplitude of the music.
caseStudy.promptEngineering: Mathematical prompt scheduling. Changing prompts exactly on the kick drum beats.
caseStudy.videoGeneration: Used Deforum Stable Diffusion locally. Mapped the kick drum to the 'zoom' parameter and the hi-hats to the 'rotation' parameter, creating a hypnotic, audio-reactive flight through latent space.
caseStudy.editing: Minimal editing required, as the generation was mathematically synced to the track.
caseStudy.motionGraphics: Added subtle optical glow and grain to unify the aesthetic.
caseStudy.lessonsLearned: Audio-reactive AI generation opens up massive possibilities for live visuals and music videos, moving beyond traditional editing into algorithmic performance.
